title: Reshoot CIF Video with a female professor
detail: Ron wants to reshoot the CIF Video with a female professor instead of Nathaniel. Small effort, but needs scheduling and a producer.
suggested_action: Confirm faculty availability, slot a half-day shoot, assign a media producer.

title: Build out Asana Enterprise
detail: Stand up the Asana Enterprise configuration (estimated 16h Michael, 8h Annie).
suggested_action: Schedule the 24h of PM time and define the rollout checklist.
